name: appsec-plugin
description: Application security threat modeling plugin. Provides a STRIDE-based threat analyst agent and skills that produce docs/security/threat-model.md (human-readable, with C4 architecture diagrams, security use case flows, and a full threat register) and threat-model.yaml (machine-readable structured export).

appsec_context.description: Mock AppSec context service. Returns team ownership, asset classification, compliance scope, prior findings, and known exceptions for a repository. Must be started manually before loading this plugin: ./mcp/appsec-context/start.sh
